title: psoralea nitens
intro: Psoralea nitens, also known as the shining psoralea or shining Bishop's weed, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. It is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or supplement, and its leaves and stems are also used in herbal preparations to make a topical salve or poultice.
